templates.name: Minimal Left
templates.description: Clean layout with logo on left, content on right. Best for simple, minimal brands.

templates.name: Bold Header
templates.description: Strong color band at top with name and title. Details at bottom. Best for corporate brands.

templates.name: Split
templates.description: Left color block with logo, right white panel with all content. Best for strong color brands.

templates.name: Dark Modern
templates.description: Dark background with light text and accent color highlights. Best for tech and startup brands.

templates.name: Centered
templates.description: All elements centered with logo on top. Great for lifestyle, creative, and personal brands.

templates.name: Gradient Flow
templates.description: Full gradient background flowing from primary to secondary brand color. Best for vibrant, energetic brands.

templates.name: Top Banner
templates.description: Thin accent color bar at very top, content below with clean spacing. Best for consultants and lawyers.

templates.name: Right Accent
templates.description: Thin color accent bar on the right side, content aligned left. Best for design and media agencies.

templates.name: Classic Clean
templates.description: Traditional business card layout with subtle border. Best for banking, legal, and formal industries.

templates.name: Vibrant Block
templates.description: Full solid brand color background with all white content. Best for bold, confident brands.
